ItacPersonItem.Notes: Priest. His name, as member of the Accademia della Fama, is in Christina Roaf, `Introduzione`, in Francesco Sansovino, Lettere sopra le diece giornate del Decamerone di M. Giovanni Boccaccio, ed. C. Roaf, Bologna (2003),pp. XVI, p. 46 n42.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
